title: Public Health Agency of Canada transparency - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Health Agency of Canada transparency
How we make information, data, publications and reports available to Canadians.

#### Access to information and privacy
The Access to Information Act and Privacy Act.

#### Proactive disclosure
Reports on financial and human resources-related information.
Acts and regulations that directly affect the health and safety of Canadians.

#### Corporate management reporting
Evaluations, plans and priorities, performance, finances and audits.

#### Consultation activities
How we engage with Canadians and stakeholders through consultations and public opinion research.

#### Reports and publications
Reports and publications on health care and public health issues that affect Canadians.
Portal for health-related datasets to access data we’ve produced, collected and used.

#### Regulatory Openness and Transparency
Explore how the department is making information about its regulatory decisions available to professionals, the public and the health industry.

#### Working for Canadians
Find stories on how the Agency is tackling serious public health issues to keep Canadians safe and healthy.
